entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: The major risk to agricultural production in semi-arid agroecosystems characterized by unpredictable weather patterns

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing crops and livestock for food and other products

entities.name: SEMI-ARID AGROECOSYSTEMS
entities.description: Environments characterized by low and erratic rainfall and high evaporation rates

entities.name: SHORT-SEASON GRAIN LEGUMES
entities.description: Legumes with a short growth cycle used to design resilient and productive farming systems

entities.name: COMMON BEAN
entities.description: Phaseolus vulgaris L., a short-season grain legume with a conservative water-loss strategy

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: Vigna unguiculata (L.) Walp., a short-season grain legume that minimizes soil evaporation

entities.name: LABLAB
entities.description: Lablab purpureus (L.) Sweet, a short-season grain legume well-adapted to dry environments

entities.name: EASTERN KENYA
entities.description: The region where the study was conducted, specifically the Machakos-Makueni transect

entities.name: MACHAKOS-MAKUENI TRANSECT
entities.description: A specific geographical transect in semi-arid Eastern Kenya used for crop assessment

entities.name: WATER RESPONSE TRIAL
entities.description: An experimental method conducted in 2012/13 and 2013/14 to collect measured data on crop water response

entities.name: APSIM
entities.description: Agricultural Production System sIMulator, a crop model used to simulate growth and development

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: An indicator used to quantify the production potential of crops

entities.name: EARLY FLOWERING
entities.description: An adaptation trait where the plant flowers early to avoid terminal drought

entities.name: POD AND SEED SET
entities.description: An adaptation trait where pods and seeds are set before the onset of terminal drought

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought occurring at the end of the growing season

entities.name: EARLY PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The timing of growth stages that allows for more optimal water use

entities.name: CANOPY ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The physical structure of the crop canopy affecting water loss and dry matter partitioning

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass

entities.name: CROP TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process of water movement through a plant and its evaporation from aerial parts

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain harvested per unit area

entities.name: IN-CROP RAINFALL
entities.description: Rainfall occurring during the crop growth period

entities.name: SEASON LENGTH
entities.description: The duration of the growing season

entities.name: SOIL EVAPORATION
entities.description: The process by which water is transferred from the land to the atmosphere

entities.name: GROUND COVER
entities.description: The extent to which the crop canopy covers the soil surface

entities.name: IN-SEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought occurring during the growth period of the crop

entities.name: WUEGRAIN
entities.description: Water use efficiency specifically measured for grain production

entities.name: WUEBIOMASS
entities.description: Water use efficiency specifically measured for biomass production

entities.name: DRY MATTER
entities.description: The organic material of the plant excluding water

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of biological material in the plant
